description_long: This is a compact submachine gun with a camouflage pattern covering its entire exterior, reminiscent of the MAC-10 or similar models. The weapon features a boxy upper receiver, a short barrel protruding slightly from the front, and a prominent vertical magazine extending downward from the grip. The grip is black and ergonomically shaped, contrasting with the rest of the camouflaged body. The top of the receiver has simple iron sights, and the overall design is utilitarian, with minimal external attachments or embellishments. The weapon's compact size and camouflage finish suggest it is intended for close-quarters use in urban or tactical environments.
description: A compact, camouflaged submachine gun with a boxy receiver, short barrel, and vertical magazine, designed for close-quarters urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the camouflaged receiver, short barrel, black grip, and extended magazine.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the narrow profile, barrel opening, and the alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the magazine, grip, and receiver details.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the receiver, the top-mounted iron sights, and the magazine extending downward.
